title: ANN Decision Flow: Advantages vs. Disadvantages
description: A flowchart that helps decide whether to use an Artificial Neural Network by weighing its key advantages against its disadvantages in the context of a specific problem.
elements: ANN Advantages (e.g., Handles non-linearity, Learns from data)
ANN Disadvantages (e.g., Computationally expensive, Black box model)
relationships: Flow starts at 'Problem Context' which leads to evaluating both 'ANN Advantages' and 'ANN Disadvantages'. The outcome of this evaluation determines the final 'Decision'.
